claim: No Stable, scroll-observation accuracy, release, package-parity, or recorded manual assistive-technology claim is made.

semantics.nativeBasis: A visibly named nav contains an ordered hierarchy of safe real anchors and one aria-current=location.
semantics.extraction: collectTableOfContentsItems is a consumer-run DOM adapter and never mutates headings.

interaction.keyboard: Native links remain in document order with sticky-safe focus geometry.
interaction.observer: Intersection observation updates uncontrolled state only; controlled state stays consumer-owned.
interaction.routing: Consumers may cancel link events and own smooth scrolling or router behavior.

enhancementIsolation.observerFalse: No IntersectionObserver, observation callbacks, or enhancement attribute exists.
enhancementIsolation.summaryOmitted: No formatter call, output, text, or accessibility contribution exists.

preferences.forcedColors: Current and focus states map to system colors.
preferences.rtl: Hierarchy indentation and current marker use logical direction.

limitations: Source-present-unreleased records do not include generated parity, packed consumers, or manual assistive-technology evidence.
Dynamic heading ownership, URL replacement, and scroll offset policy remain consumer responsibilities.
